title: 1 Under-the-Radar Value Stock That's Been Beating the Market for Years
text: This overlooked stock has crushed the S&P 500, returning investors 443% over 10 years.

title: Assurant stock trading at all-time high after investor day
text: Shares of financial and insurance company Assurant Inc. AIZ, +2.18% on Thursday rose 2.2% to an all-time high of $182.87 after the financial services company held an investor day. Truist analyst Mark Hughes on Friday hiked his price target to $220 a share from $210 and reiterated a buy rating on the stock.

title: Assurant to Share Strategic Vision, 2022 Outlook and Long-term Financial Objectives at Investor Day
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ), a leading global business services company that supports, protects and connects major consumer purchases, today will host its virtual Investor Day where it will share its company vision and provide its financial outlook for 2022 and financial objectives for 2023-2024. “Our long track record of outperformance gives us confidence in our ability to deliver on our stated financial objectives over the next three years,” said Keith Demmings, Pres
